case_title: CLORINDA MERCEDES CORTEZ VS. GLENYS A. AGUILERA

calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Cortez (Son of Plaintiff). Glenys A. Aguilar (Defendant). Lupe Arreola (Interpreter).

Parties and Interpreter sworn. No appearance was made by Plaintiff Clorinda Mercedes Cortez and service was defective. The matter was taken off calendar. Plaintiff is to submit a for request for reissuance.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
